languages.text: {n}Вокс-модулятор предка издает тихий недовольный рокот.{/n} "Это не те воспоминания, которые я хотел бы разделить с вами, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Я не доверяю вам в достаточной мере, пусть мы и являемся членами одной династии".

{n}His vox-modulator lets out a low rumble of displeasure.{/n} "These are not memories I am keen to share with you, my heir. I do not trust you enough for that, bound by dynastic bonds though we may be."
languages.original_text: {n}Вокс-модулятор предка издает тихий недовольный рокот.{/n} "Это не те воспоминания, которые я хотел бы разделить с вами, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Я не доверяю вам в достаточной мере, пусть мы и являемся членами одной династии".

{n}His vox-modulator lets out a low rumble of displeasure.{/n} "These are not memories I am keen to share with you, my heir. I do not trust you enough for that, bound by dynastic bonds though we may be."

languages.text: {n}彼のヴォックス・モジュレーターが、不快げな低い唸りを漏らす。{/n}「これは、後継者たる君と分かち合いたいと思うような記憶ではない。王朝の絆で結ばれた仲とはいえ、私は君をそこまで信用してはいないのだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}His vox-modulator lets out a low rumble of displeasure.{/n} "These are not memories I am keen to share with you, my heir. I do not trust you enough for that, bound by dynastic bonds though we may be."

traits.locale_text: {n}彼のヴォックス・モジュレーターが、不快げな低い唸りを漏らす。{/n}「これは、後継者たる君と分かち合いたいと思うような記憶ではない。王朝の絆で結ばれた仲とはいえ、私は君をそこまで信用してはいないのだ。」

languages.text: {n}他的音阵调制器发出一声不悦而低沉的嗡鸣。{/n}“这些往事我并不急于同你分享，我的继承人。我对你的信任还远远没到那份上，哪怕我们之间有家族的纽带。”
languages.original_text: {n}His vox-modulator lets out a low rumble of displeasure.{/n} "These are not memories I am keen to share with you, my heir. I do not trust you enough for that, bound by dynastic bonds though we may be."

traits.locale_text: {n}他的音阵调制器发出一声不悦而低沉的嗡鸣。{/n}“这些往事我并不急于同你分享，我的继承人。我对你的信任还远远没到那份上，哪怕我们之间有家族的纽带。”

languages.text: {n}Voks modülatöründen hoşnutsuz bir homurtu yükseliyor.{/n} "Bunlar seninle paylaşmaya hevesli olduğum anılar değil vârisim. Hanedanlık bağlarıyla birbirimize bağlı olsak da bunun için sana yeterince güvenmiyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}His vox-modulator lets out a low rumble of displeasure.{/n} "These are not memories I am keen to share with you, my heir. I do not trust you enough for that, bound by dynastic bonds though we may be."

traits.locale_text: {n}Voks modülatöründen hoşnutsuz bir homurtu yükseliyor.{/n} "Bunlar seninle paylaşmaya hevesli olduğum anılar değil vârisim. Hanedanlık bağlarıyla birbirimize bağlı olsak da bunun için sana yeterince güvenmiyorum."

languages.text: {n}Su voco modulador suelta un gruñido grave de desagrado.{/n} «No son recuerdos que quiera compartir, hereder{mf|o|a}. Por mucho que nos aten lazos dinásticos, no confío tanto en usted».
languages.original_text: {n}His vox-modulator lets out a low rumble of displeasure.{/n} "These are not memories I am keen to share with you, my heir. I do not trust you enough for that, bound by dynastic bonds though we may be."

traits.locale_text: {n}Su voco modulador suelta un gruñido grave de desagrado.{/n} «No son recuerdos que quiera compartir, hereder{mf|o|a}. Por mucho que nos aten lazos dinásticos, no confío tanto en usted».

languages.text: {n}Un grondement mécontent s'échappe de son modulateur-vox.{/n} « Je ne suis pas prêt à partager ces souvenirs avec vous. Je n'ai pas suffisamment confiance en vous pour cela, malgré les liens dynastiques qui nous unissent. »
languages.original_text: {n}His vox-modulator lets out a low rumble of displeasure.{/n} "These are not memories I am keen to share with you, my heir. I do not trust you enough for that, bound by dynastic bonds though we may be."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un grondement mécontent s'échappe de son modulateur-vox.{/n} « Je ne suis pas prêt à partager ces souvenirs avec vous. Je n'ai pas suffisamment confiance en vous pour cela, malgré les liens dynastiques qui nous unissent. »

languages.text: {n}Aus seinem Voxmodulator ertönt ein missmutiges Knurren.{/n} "Das sind keine Erinnerungen, die ich mit Euch teilen möchte, {mf|werter Erbe|werte Erbin}. Dafür vertraue ich Euch nicht genug, dynastische Bande hin oder her."
languages.original_text: {n}His vox-modulator lets out a low rumble of displeasure.{/n} "These are not memories I am keen to share with you, my heir. I do not trust you enough for that, bound by dynastic bonds though we may be."

traits.locale_text: {n}Aus seinem Voxmodulator ertönt ein missmutiges Knurren.{/n} "Das sind keine Erinnerungen, die ich mit Euch teilen möchte, {mf|werter Erbe|werte Erbin}. Dafür vertraue ich Euch nicht genug, dynastische Bande hin oder her."
